first_runtime_owner_seam.summary: A truthful Meta-Basin lane must own explanation-state sampling and render-class emission directly instead of relabeling an existing root-basin or sidecar seam.

rejected_current_carriers.reason: Current carrier emits projected-root class ids from legacy complex-point samples instead of explanation-state attractor classes.
Current carrier classifies root-sector x transient pressure-band outcomes for projected Newton orbits, not explanation-state attractors.
Current measurement/lens/window sidecars are post-sample consumers of existing runtime output and do not own the per-pixel state space or rendered class contract.
Current seam is host/runtime walk telemetry rather than per-pixel Meta-Basin sampling, so it cannot own a fractal render lane.

state_attractor_model.pixel_domain: pixels represent different initial explanation-states rather than only different complex seeds

classification_render_output.primary_semantics: basins are attractors of explanation trajectories, not roots of P(z)
classification_render_output.blocked_reason: Current renderer consumes FractalSampleResult root and escape style channels and has no explanation-state class channel to color a Meta-Basin outcome honestly.

explicitly_blocked_controls.reason: Animation-only seed stepping over the legacy Explaino carrier does not own Meta-Basin explanation-state dynamics.
This currently tunes Newton root convergence on legacy sample surfaces, not explanation-state attractor closure.
This selects the cubic versus quartic unit-root projection family for the legacy projection carrier, not a Meta-Basin state family.
This owns the legacy radial projection manifold radius for Projection-and-Flow, not Meta-Basin state evolution.
This owns the legacy projection pressure-band split for projected-root classes, not explanation attractor identity.
This is the legacy Explaino warp-start seed and not a higher-order explanation-state coordinate.
This steps the legacy Explaino seed and has no truthful Meta-Basin state ownership or isolated sensitivity proof.
This steps the legacy Explaino seed and has no truthful Meta-Basin state ownership or isolated sensitivity proof.
This controls the legacy Explaino warp-start perturbation rather than a Meta-Basin explanation trajectory seam.
This spreads the current Explaino custom root placements and does not map to Meta-Basin attractor structure.
This modulates legacy Explaino phase influence over current root geometry, not explanation-state attractor classes.
This changes the legacy Newton step size and not a Meta-Basin explanation-state transition rule.
This is the current Explaino phase carrier control and does not own Meta-Basin state or classification semantics.
This interpolates the legacy Explaino seed surface and has no truthful Meta-Basin explanation-state authority.
This toggles legacy Explaino seed tween behavior and has no truthful Meta-Basin explanation-state authority.

one_at_a_time_sensitivity.reason: No current visible control is truthful for Meta-Basin on the merged head, so no live control is eligible for one-at-a-time sensitivity proof in this slice.
